# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout source
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p build artifacts/config artifacts/scripts

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/bin
          if [ -f Makefile ] || [ -f makefile ]; then
            make
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B package
          elif [ -f gradlew ]; then
            chmod +x ./gradlew
            ./gradlew build
          else
            echo "No recognized build file found. Add your build commands here."
          fi

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/binaries
          find build dist target . -type f \( -perm -111 -o -name "*.jar" -o -name "*.war" -o -name "*.exe" -o -name "*.dll" -o -name "*.so" -o -name "*.dylib" -o -name "*.bin" \) 2>/dev/null \
            | grep -v '^./artifacts/' \
            | while read -r file; do
                cp --parents "$file" artifacts/binaries/ 2>/dev/null || true
              done

      - name: Collect configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/config
          find . -type f \( -name "*.json" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.toml" -o -name "*.ini" -o -name "*.conf" -o -name "*.config" -o -name ".env*" \) 2>/dev/null \
            | grep -vE '^./(\.git|node_modules|artifacts)/' \
            | while read -r file; do
                cp --parents "$file" artifacts/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
              done

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/scripts
          find . -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.ps1" -o -name "*.bat" -o -name "Dockerfile*" -o -name "docker-compose*.yml" -o -name "docker-compose*.yaml" -o -name "*.tpl" \) 2>/dev/null \
            | grep -vE '^./(\.git|node_modules|artifacts)/' \
            | while read -r file; do
                cp --parents "$file" artifacts/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
              done

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: internal-build-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: artifacts/
          if-no-files-found: warn
          retention-days: 30
